source: DUKES 2025, Table 6.2 (Capacity of, and electricity generated from, renewable sources), 2024 column. UK-wide, full installed capacity (not de-rated).
basis_note: UK-wide (not GB only). Wind offshore includes 0.08 GW floating; the wind subtotal reconciles to onshore + offshore. Solar 18.28 GW is end-2024 DUKES; the live layer's NESO/PV_Live solar capacity (~22-23 GW) is GB, DC/MWp and 2026-vintage, so a live capacity-share must use that GB-DC denominator, never this one. End-2025 provisional (Energy Trends ET 6.1): wind 33.09 GW, solar 21.74 GW. See engine/NOTES.md #2.
